creator: sten@blinkenlights.nl
text:
On Thu, 13 Mar 2008, lwhsu@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: irc/py-gozerbot update to 0.8.0.4
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: lwhsu
> State-Changed-When: Thu Mar 13 22:44:59 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why:
> Ask for maintainer fix.
>

Apologies, the pkg-message file shouldn't have been included,
it was a result of previous tests.

Here is the same diff, without the pkg-message diff:

diff -Nru py-gozerbot.old/Makefile py-gozerbot/Makefile
--- py-gozerbot.old/Makefile	2008-03-13 21:42:25.000000000 +0100
+++ py-gozerbot/Makefile	2008-03-13 22:28:15.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	gozerbot
-PORTVERSION=	0.7.1.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.0.4
  CATEGORIES=	irc python
  MASTER_SITES=	http://gozerbot.org/media/tarball/ \
  		${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
@@ -35,9 +34,6 @@
  RUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/gpg:${PORTSDIR}/security/gnupg

  post-install:
-.if !defined(BATCH)
-	@${SED} -e 's:%%PREFIX%%:${PREFIX}:g'
-.endif
  	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}

  .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
diff -Nru py-gozerbot.old/distinfo py-gozerbot/distinfo
--- py-gozerbot.old/distinfo	2007-09-22 00:03:39.000000000 +0200
+++ py-gozerbot/distinfo	2008-03-13 21:44:23.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SIZE (gozerbot-0.7.1.1.tar.gz) = 267324
+MD5 (gozerbot-0.8.0.4.tar.gz) = 3e8e094f8f15f05ce9e15d1238004a76
+SHA256 (gozerbot-0.8.0.4.tar.gz) = dbadb6156050aae03234d933870c506d1c37d80bdad69dc304e748b03c4e3f3e
+SIZE (gozerbot-0.8.0.4.tar.gz) = 280203
